description_long: This object appears to be a large, smooth, and elongated form with a gently curved surface, resembling a section of a wall or architectural molding. The visible surfaces are uniform and feature subtle linear details, possibly indicating a decorative or structural element. The coloration is a light beige or cream, with a consistent matte finish across the visible areas. There are no discernible features such as limbs, facial details, or clothing, and the object lacks any articulation or segmentation typical of a human figure. The form is solid and continuous, with no visible openings, joints, or accessories. Overall, it does not visually resemble a pedestrian adult or any human figure.
description: A large, smooth, beige, and elongated form with subtle linear details and a matte finish, lacking any human features or articulation.
description_view_0: This view is completely black, with no visible features or details.
description_view_1: This view is also completely black, with no visible features or details.
description_view_2: A close-up of a smooth, beige surface with a linear groove, possibly part of a larger architectural or structural element.
description_view_3: A wider view of the same smooth, beige surface, showing more of the elongated form and its gentle curvature.
